name: cavemanizer
description: LLM-backed compressor for agent skills and always-loaded context.

scripts.generate:examples: node bin/cavemanizer.js compress examples/fixtures --out-dir examples/generated --provider fixture --mode caveman --budget 120
scripts.check: npm test && node bin/cavemanizer.js check examples/fixtures --out-dir examples/generated --provider fixture --mode caveman --budget 120
